headline: DXCM Q1 Deep Dive: U.S. Growth Moderates as Product Momentum and Coverage Expansion Drive Strategy
summary: Medical device company DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 15% year on year to $1.19 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $5.21 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.56 per share was 19% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
